2168010.name: Karos - Ultra pack
2168010.description:
The Ultra Package contains many useful items. This elite set is designed for real warriors striving for victory at any cost, and its contents will not leave anyone indifferent. Embark on a quest with lots of supplies, wings and a temporary suit. Prove that you are the best!

Buying a set, you get a set of items at a discount!

Remember that you can only buy a Starter Pack once.

the Package Contains:



  • The winner's costume is reinforced (30 days)
    Put together this equipment set will grant great strength to its owner!
    • Winner's cuirass (30 days) (1 piece)
    • Winner's gloves (30 days) (1 piece)
    • Winner's greaves (30 days) (1 piece)
    • Winner's shoes (30 days) (1 piece)
  • Reborn Phoenix (1 piece)
    This pet will provide your character with protection, attack and movement speed
  • Experience Ring (30 days)
    An enchanted ring with the seal of wisdom, from which emanates a pleasant warmth. The ring helps its owner gain additional experience, but the magic gradually melts and the time to use it is limited.
  • Platinum Concentration Potion (24 hours) (1 piece)
    This potion reduces the cooldown of all skills by 50%.

You can get the purchased set in the "Gifts" menu of the in-game store.
2168010.supported_languages:
俄语*, 土耳其语, 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
